prompt: Pull the maximum-history price chart at daily fidelity for the YES token on 'Will Bitcoin hit $150k by June 30, 2026?' Plot the implied probability over time so I can see how the curve has compressed or run as the deadline has approached and BTC spot has moved.
expectedReason: time-series chart needs enough history to show shape
responsePreview:
As of May 5, 2026, the implied probability for Bitcoin hitting $150,000 by June 30, 2026, has experienced a near-total compression, falling from a peak of 67% in August 2025 to just 1.35% today.

The line chart shows a steady downward curve with several distinct phases of market repricing. After peaking in mid-August 2025, the probability compressed throughout the autumn. A major regime shift occurred in early November 2025, where the odds collapsed from approximately 41% into the high-20s, eventually hitting the teens by year-end. For the last several months (February through May 2026), the market has remained pinned in a narrow band between 1.3% and 2.6%.

**Key Trend Observations:**
